name: Black Bean Fiesta
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the olive oil, lime juice, cilantro, cumin, salt, and pepper until well combined.
2. Add the cooked black beans and vegetables to the bowl.
3. Toss everything together until evenly coated with the dressing.
4. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
5. Garnish with extra chopped cilantro before serving.
